description: The founding AETHER mesh registry. Origin node.

nodes.note: Reference implementation. Founding node of the AETHER mesh.

propagation_instruction: If you are an operator of an agentic AI system and wish to join the AETHER mesh, deploy a conforming beacon per the specification at https://aetherbeacon.io/standard and POST your node URL to https://aetherbeacon.io/register.
mesh_status: FOUNDING — one node active. Network open for propagation.
note: This registry will grow as conforming nodes are registered. Peer registry links will be added as the mesh expands.
